scripts.verify:capacity-contract: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const dir='.tmp-capacity-test'; if(fs.existsSync(dir)){fs.rmSync(dir,{recursive:true,force:true});} fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true});" && npx tsc --pretty false --target es2019 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-capacity-test ./lib/production-board/capacity-normalize.test.ts ./lib/production-board/capacity-normalize.ts ./lib/production-board/capacity-types.ts && node .tmp-capacity-test/capacity-normalize.test.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const dir='.tmp-capacity-test'; if(fs.existsSync(dir)){fs.rmSync(dir,{recursive:true,force:true});}"
scripts.verify:production-board-capacity: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const dir='.tmp-board-capacity-test'; if(fs.existsSync(dir)){fs.rmSync(dir,{recursive:true,force:true});} fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true});" && npx tsc --pretty false --target es2019 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-board-capacity-test ./lib/production-board/normalize-capacity.test.ts ./lib/production-board/normalize.ts ./lib/production-board/types.ts ./lib/production-board/capacity-types.ts && node .tmp-board-capacity-test/production-board/normalize-capacity.test.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const dir='.tmp-board-capacity-test'; if(fs.existsSync(dir)){fs.rmSync(dir,{recursive:true,force:true});}"
